item.title: Lemon Ricotta Cake inspired by the Duo mini bag and charms đźŤ...
item.description:
Lemon Ricotta Cake inspired by the Duo mini bag and charms đźŤ“đźŤ‹ Get yours now! Ingredients For the cake -190g all purpose flour -2 tsp baking powder -1/2 tsp fine salt -250g whole milk ricotta, room temperature -200g granulated sugar -3 large eggs, room temperature -120ml neutral oil or melted unsalted butter -Zest of 2 lemons -2 tbsp fresh lemon juice -1 tsp vanilla extract For the macerated strawberries -300g fresh strawberries, hulled and sliced -2 tbsp granulated sugar -Juice of half a lemon -Zest of half a lemon For finishing -Powdered sugar for dusting -Fresh lemon zest -Heavy whipping cream, lightly whipped with a bit of powdered sugar and lemon zest *I recommend serving the whipped cream on the side so the cake lasts longer. A nice dusting of powdered sugar for presentation on top of the cake is perfect!*
@kate spade new york
FULL POST | EMBED | REVERSED
